_readme: Use these payloads to test the workflow via n8n's manual trigger. In the workflow canvas, click the Gmail Trigger node → 'Listen for test event', then paste one of these objects. Check each branch fires as expected.

payload.subject: URGENT: Your API has been returning 503 errors for 30 minutes
payload.text: Your API has been down since 2:15 PM IST. We're seeing 503 errors on every call to /v1/process. This is impacting 8,000 active users on our platform. We need someone on a call in the next 30 minutes or we will be switching to an alternative provider. This is completely unacceptable for an enterprise contract.
payload.snippet: Your API has been down since 2:15 PM IST. We're seeing 503 errors on every call...

expected.action: AI draft reply created, saved as Gmail draft

payload.subject: Can't login to my account
payload.text: Hi, I've been trying to log into my account for the past hour and I keep getting an 'invalid credentials' error. I already reset my password twice using the reset link and it's still not working. I have an important report due today and I can't access any of my data. My account email is alice.j@customer.com. Please help ASAP.
payload.snippet: Hi, I've been trying to log into my account for the past hour...

payload.subject: Question about bulk export
payload.text: Hi team! Love the product — we've been using it for 3 months and it's saved us so much time. Quick question: is there a way to bulk export all our data to CSV? I can only find the export button on individual records. Thanks in advance!
payload.snippet: Hi team! Love the product — quick question about bulk export...

test_cases.name: Test 4 — Sales: Pricing inquiry from prospect

payload.subject: Interested in Enterprise plan for our team of 45
payload.text: Hello, we're a 45-person startup evaluating workflow automation tools. We saw your product mentioned in a review and the features look like a great fit. Could you send over Enterprise pricing? We're looking to onboard roughly 30 seats and would love a demo call this week if possible. We have budget approved and are looking to move quickly.
payload.snippet: Hello, we're a 45-person startup evaluating workflow automation tools...

payload.subject: This week in SaaS: top 10 tools, funding rounds, and growth hacks
payload.text:
Unsubscribe | View in browser | Manage preferences

Welcome to this week's SaaS Weekly! Here's what's been happening:

1. Top 10 tools for remote teams
2. $50M Series B for TaskFlow
3. How Notion grew to 10M users

Click here to read the full issue. See you next week!
payload.snippet: This week's roundup: top tools, funding news, and growth hacks...

test_cases.name: Test 6 — Edge case: Ambiguous / low confidence

expected.action: Routed to Slack manual review channel

payload.subject: Hi
payload.text: Hi, I wanted to reach out. Can we talk?
payload.snippet: Hi, I wanted to reach out. Can we talk?
